intent: We are not building the Forge Agent architecture. We are building a Mac Consensus Dev Agent that will use consensus AI to develop high quality software. Use all the documents in the local repo to determine the architecture
scope_statement:
Build the complete Consensus Dev Agent — a native macOS AI coding agent that uses dual-LLM consensus (Claude + GPT-4o with Claude arbitrating) to develop high-quality software autonomously from technical specifications. The system comprises a two-process architecture: a Swift/SwiftUI shell (UI, Touch ID auth, Keychain secrets, XPC channel, process management per TRD-1) and a Python 3.12 backend (ConsensusEngine per TRD-2, 8-stage BuildPipeline with 3-pass review per TRD-3, GitHubTool per TRD-5, BuildLedger per TRD-4, DocumentStore with FAISS vector retrieval per TRD-10, HolisticReview per TRD-6, TRDWorkflow with FOUNDER/ENGINEER/CONSULTANT modes per TRD-7), connected via authenticated Unix socket with line-delimited JSON (TRD-1 §6, TRD-12), with Mac CI runner infrastructure for Swift validation (TRD-9), comprehensive security controls (TRD-11), recovery and state management (TRD-13), iterative code quality pipeline (TRD-14), and full testing/validation strategy (TRD-16). The agent decomposes plain-language intent into ordered PRDs, generates PR specs, implements code via parallel consensus generation, runs iterative fix loops (up to 20 passes with escalating strategies), executes CI, and gates on operator approval at every merge point.

prd_plan.title: Product Identity, Branding, and Canonical Naming
Swift macOS Shell Architecture and Application Skeleton
Swift Authentication, Session Lifecycle, and Keychain Security
Authenticated Swift–Python IPC Channel and Runtime Handshake
Backend Process Management, Startup Ordering, Health Monitoring, and Graceful Shutdown
GitHub Integration Layer and Repository Bootstrap
Document Import, Parsing UX, and Project Document Lifecycle
Document Store, Embedding Pipeline, FAISS Retrieval, and Injection Defense
Consensus Engine Core, Provider Adapters, and Arbitration Logic
Build Ledger, Multi-Agent Coordination, and Dependency Journaling
Intent Intake, Scope Confirmation, and Ordered PRD Planning
PRD Generation and PR Specification Decomposition
Code Generation Stage and Native-Output Pre-Commit Quality Gates
Three-Pass Review, Security Scanning, and Unexpected URL Detection
Iterative 20-Pass Local Fix Loop and Test Growth Engine
CI Gate, Cross-Environment Validation, and Autonomous CI Fix Loop
macOS CI Runner Infrastructure and Swift Validation Pipeline
Operator Gates, Build Stream UX, and Context Panel Integration
Recovery, Checkpointing, Resume Flow, and State Durability
Security Control Framework and Threat Model Enforcement
TRD Workflow with FOUNDER, ENGINEER, and CONSULTANT Modes
Holistic Review Workflow and Review Fix PR Generation
Comprehensive Test Strategy, Coverage Enforcement, and Live Validation
Operational Hardening, Observability, Settings Migration, and Release Readiness
